mechanism_narrative: Rising consumer credit and housing starts indicate sustained demand expansion, boosting corporate earnings and equity valuations over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.05 over any 3-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in triggered instances are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rapid 1-month increase in the federal funds rate compresses equity discount rates and signals restrictive policy, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the subsequent month.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns remain positive in >60% of rapid-hike instances, or Rank IC exceeds 0.05 over any 2-year window.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in nonfarm payrolls and industrial production confirms a balanced supply-demand expansion, reducing recession risk and supporting equity valuations over a quarterly horizon.
failure_condition: The joint signal produces negative forward returns in >50% of instances, or the interaction term loses statistical significance (p > 0.10) in a multivariate regression.

mechanism_narrative: Quarterly GDP growth exceeding 3.0% annualized reflects peak earnings momentum that equity markets price in ahead of deceleration, generating positive forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Forward returns turn negative when GDP growth decelerates below 2.0% annualized, or the signal fails to predict returns in the final two quarters of historical expansions.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid 2-month rise in the unemployment rate signals imminent labor market deterioration and recession, triggering immediate equity sell-offs over the next week.
failure_condition: Markets rally or remain flat in >60% of instances following the threshold breach, or the signal exhibits no predictive power over rolling 1-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: When CPI inflation exceeds 3.0% while the federal funds rate remains below 3.0%, negative real rates trigger stagflation fears and equity underperformance over the subsequent month.
failure_condition: Equity returns remain positive when inflation and rates move in tandem, or the interaction effect reverses sign during high-inflation periods.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production reflects robust manufacturing activity and supply chain health, providing immediate positive momentum for cyclical equities over the next week.
failure_condition: Rank IC remains negative over any 3-year rolling window, or 5-day forward returns show no statistical difference between rising and falling INDPRO periods.

mechanism_narrative: When housing starts sustain above 1.8 million units alongside rising consumer credit, the housing sector acts as a leading indicator for broader economic strength, driving positive equity returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Returns turn negative when housing peaks while credit stagnates, or the joint signal fails to outperform a baseline buy-and-hold strategy over any 5-year period.
